name: Rosemary Roasted Potatoes
recipeIngredient: 2 lb Potatoes; peeled and diced into 1-inch chunks
recipeInstructions:
1. Toss the diced potatoes with olive oil, paprika, garlic, and half the crushed rosemary.
2. Place the potatoes on a heavy baking tray.
3. Sprinkle the remaining rosemary and 1/2 teaspoon salt over the potatoes.
4. Roast at 400°F for 1 hour and 30 minutes, turning occasionally.
Serve as garnish for roasts.
